name: Super Mario Bros. RPG
description:
This Super Mario Bros. RPG since I can't find any that aren't all about sexual stuff and also none that has more than one person in it so this features most of the characters from the Super Mario Bros. and Super Mario Galaxy movie (plus a few that they didn't include in them) including:

Main Characters:

Mario, Luigi, Peach, Toad, Bowser, Rosalina, Bowser Jr., Donkey Kong/D.K., Kamek, Cranky Kong, and Yoshi

Notable Characters:

Fox McCloud, Luma's, Toad's, and Toad General

Were Mentioned and also Fan Wanting:

Star Fox Team (Falco Lombardi, Slippy Toad, and Peppy Hare), Princess Daisy, Toadette, Wario, and Waluigo
creator: looseer7869
